task_completion.description: Open and read the comet alert document to get target details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '~/Documents/comet_alert.txt' with details about 29P/Schwassmann-Wachmann 1.

task_completion.description: Slew the telescope to the correct coordinates for 29P/Schwassmann-Wachmann 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars sky map showing the telescope crosshairs centered on or near RA 06h 15m 22s (6.2561h) and Dec +23° 04' 18" (23.0717°), or the target '29P' selected in the Ekos mount module.

task_completion.description: Capture at least five 60-second R-band CCD images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos capture module showing a sequence of at least 5 R-band images at 60s exposure, or a file manager/terminal showing at least 5 new FITS files in '/home/ga/Images/comets/29P/R/'.

task_completion.description: Capture at least three 45-second V-band CCD images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos capture module showing a sequence of at least 3 V-band images at 45s exposure, or a file manager/terminal showing at least 3 new FITS files in '/home/ga/Images/comets/29P/V/'.

task_completion.description: Generate a widefield sky view finding chart using the provided script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the execution of '~/capture_sky_view.sh' or a file manager/image viewer displaying 'finding_chart.png' in '/home/ga/Images/comets/29P/'.

task_completion.description: Write an ICQ-format observation report with required comet data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/icq_report_29P.txt' containing the comet designation (29P), an estimated total magnitude, coma diameter, and degree of condensation (DC).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used KStars/Ekos to capture the images rather than mocking them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the KStars/Ekos GUI being actively used to configure and run the capture sequence, rather than terminal commands like 'touch' or 'cp' being used to fake FITS files.

integrity.description: Verify the finding chart was generated using the specified script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the terminal command executing '~/capture_sky_view.sh' rather than the agent manually downloading an image from the internet or renaming an existing image.

integrity.description: Verify the ICQ report contains plausible estimated values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in 'icq_report_29P.txt' should have actual numbers for magnitude, coma diameter, and condensation, not just placeholder text like '[insert magnitude here]'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: 29P/Schwassmann-Wachmann 1. Coordinates: RA 6.2561h (06h 15m 22s), Dec 23.0717° (+23° 04' 18"). Required R-band images: at least 5. Required V-band images: at least 3. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/icq_report_29P.txt. Finding chart path: /home/ga/Images/comets/29P/finding_chart.png. The ICQ report must contain comet designation (29P), estimated magnitude, coma diameter, and degree of condensation (DC).
